params.SpellDescription: You control target opponent during their next combat phase. If this spell's additional cost was paid, you control that player during their next turn instead. Exile CARDNAME.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: You control target opponent during their next combat phase. If this spell's additional cost was paid, you control that player during their next turn instead. Exile CARDNAME.

params.Description: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may waterbend {10}.
